title: centaurea boissieri subsp. pinae
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. pinae is a subspecies of the Centaurea boissieri plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Centaurea boissieri subsp. pinae include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible role in preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other inflammatory disorders.
